Meaning.En: Move through the air using wings, typically referring to birds, insects, or aircraft.
Meaning.Example: The bird flew south for the winter.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả hành động chim, côn trùng, hoặc máy bay di chuyển trên không.
Situation.En: Describes the action of birds, insects, or aircraft moving through the air.

Meaning.En: Move or travel very quickly or suddenly.
Meaning.Example: The car flew past us on the highway.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả chuyển động nhanh, vọt qua một cách đột ngột.
Situation.En: Describes sudden, rapid movement past something or someone.

Meaning.Vi: Côn trùng cánh cứng (côn trùng bay)
Meaning.En: An insect of the order Diptera, typically having a single pair of wings and large eyes.
Meaning.Example: A housefly landed on the food.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả loài côn trùng nhỏ, thường gặp trong nhà, có khả năng bay.
Situation.En: Describes a small, common household insect capable of flight.

Meaning.En: A fastening device consisting of two rows of metal or plastic teeth, opened and closed by a slider.
Meaning.Example: She fixed the zipper on her jacket.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả bộ phận đóng/mở trên quần áo để cố định.
Situation.En: Describes the opening/closing mechanism on clothing.

Meaning.En: Operate or travel in an aircraft.
Meaning.Example: We’re flying to Tokyo next week.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả việc đi lại bằng máy bay.
